named-native-query.name: LinkResource.findMenusForInternalUser
named-native-query.query:
WITH user_perms AS ( SELECT rsrc_id, insert_flg FROM cxxcow.users_resources WHERE user_id = :userId )
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT l.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN l.label_key = 'icd_link_card_order_desc' AND l.link_uri_addr = '/cardorder/init' THEN 'CARD_ORDER' ELSE l.rsrc_id END ORDER BY l.level_0_sort_nbr ) AS rn FROM dbo.link_resource l WHERE l.level_0_sort_nbr > 0
-- PFYW rule AND NOT ( l.label_key = 'icd_link_pfyw_web' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_perms up WHERE up.rsrc_id = 'WEB-ICD-PFYW' ) )
-- SFTP rule AND NOT ( l.label_key = 'icd_link_sftp_rpt' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_perms up WHERE up.rsrc_id = 'WEB-ICD-SFTP-CARD-RPT' ) )
-- Card Order permission rule AND NOT ( l.label_key = 'icd_link_card_order_desc' AND l.link_uri_addr = '/cardorder/init' AND NOT ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_perms up WHERE up.rsrc_id = 'WEB-ICD-VCARD' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_perms up WHERE up.rsrc_id = 'WEB-ICD-CMAS-CARD' AND up.insert_flg = 'Y' ) ) ) ) t WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY menu_flag DESC, level_0_sort_nbr, level_1_sort_nbr, level_2_sort_nbr
